stories.title: Bulk task selection and context menu
stories.description:
Multi-select tasks in list and kanban views with standard OS selection patterns. Click selects one task and deselects others. Cmd+Click toggles individual tasks in/out of selection. Shift+Click selects a range between last selected and clicked task (works across status sections in list view, within-column only in kanban). Cmd+A selects all visible tasks. Escape clears selection. Selection clears on view switch.

When multiple tasks are selected (selectedTaskIds.size > 1), the detail panel closes. Right-clicking a selected task shows a bulk context menu with a 'N tasks selected' header. Right-clicking an unselected task clears the selection and shows the normal single-task context menu.

Bulk context menu actions (same order as single-task menu, same names, minus inapplicable items): status row, Add/Remove My Day, Priority flyout, Labels flyout, Snooze flyout, Delete (red, bottom). Bulk delete shows persistent confirmation toast with Delete/Archive/Cancel, same as single-task delete.

Selected tasks use the same visual style as single selection: bg-accent/12 border-l-2 border-accent/15. Drag-and-drop remains single-task only — dragging a selected task does not move other selected tasks.

Store changes: replace currentTaskId with selectedTaskIds: Set<string> and add lastSelectedTaskId for Shift+Click range calculation. Add bulk action methods to taskStore.

Before marking passes: true: read ui-reference.md and debug-learnings.md. Write tests for any new repository methods or utility functions. Run npm run test — all existing and new tests must pass. Run npm run typecheck — zero errors.
acceptance_criteria: Click selects one task, deselects all others
Cmd+Click toggles a task in/out of selection without affecting others
Shift+Click selects a contiguous range from last selected task to clicked task, across status sections in list view
Cmd+A selects all visible tasks in the current view
Detail panel closes when more than one task is selected
Right-clicking a selected task (when multiple selected) shows bulk context menu with 'N tasks selected' header
Right-clicking an unselected task clears selection, selects that task, shows normal single-task context menu
Bulk context menu includes: status row, Add/Remove My Day, Priority, Labels, Snooze, Delete
Bulk delete shows persistent toast with Delete/Archive/Cancel options
All bulk actions apply to every selected task
Multi-select works in both list view and kanban view
Shift+Click in kanban only selects within a column
Selected tasks use same visual style as single selection
Dragging a task does not move other selected tasks
